Sidebar.title: My Digital Garden
Sidebar.description: A multilingual blog shell with theme tokens, fixed sidebar and smooth reading flow.
Sidebar.bio: A couple of sentences about you — what you write about and what you care about.

Home.title: A multilingual starter for a personal blog
Home.description: The left menu stays fixed while the right content pane scrolls independently, with next-intl for i18n, next-themes for color mode, and extendable theme palette config.
Home.articlesDesc: This area is prepared for post lists, tags, publish dates and reading time, making it easy to connect Markdown, a CMS or a database later.
Home.themeDesc: Two sample palettes are included, and you can keep adding more branded themes through config or an API endpoint.
Home.themeOcean: Good for calm, technical and writing-focused blogs.
Home.themeViolet: Good for creative portfolios and illustration-driven blogs.

0.title: Designing a durable blog information architecture
0.excerpt: Separate navigation, categories, tags and collections so your content stays maintainable.

1.title: Structuring multilingual pages with the App Router
1.excerpt: A shared [locale] route segment keeps your home, article and about pages consistent.

2.title: How to split theme color tokens
2.excerpt: Start with background, card, border, text, primary and soft-primary tokens.

Articles.title: Article archive
Articles.description: Connect this section to MDX, Contentlayer, Notion API or any headless CMS.

Projects.title: Project showcase
Projects.description: Use this area for case studies, experiments, open-source work and talks.

About.title: About me
About.description: Use this page for your bio, skill tags, contact details and résumé summary.
